source.scope: Official-source-backed Finland calendar-year 2026 state and caller-confirmed municipal earned-income tax on post-deduction taxable bases.

FI.notes: Calendar-year 2026 state earned-income tax and caller-confirmed municipal earned-income tax on separate post-deduction taxable bases. Deduction derivation, church tax, broadcasting tax and contributions remain outside scope.
